title: Gimbal
description: An open source building assist mod featuring Vim-like modes and modifiers.
body: ![Gimbal logo with name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fad4213b246106f0df0836824729ab4a7781683.png) A free and open source builing assist mod, featuring Vim-like modes and modifiers. ***Notice: This mod is still in early development. There are still a lot of bugs and missing features.*** --- # Dependencies - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) # Features You can find a showcase of the special modes and modifiers [here](https://codeberg.org/moonleay/Gimbal/wiki/Showcase). ### Modes - Normal (The default mode. Return to this mode anytime by pressing `ESC`.) - Insert (Edit the world, as you normally would. Default keybinding: `i`.) - Replace (Replace blocks with others. Default keybinding: `r`.) ### Modifiers (All unbound by default!) - No Clip (Fly through blocks.) - Force Place (Allow placement of all blocks, anywhere.) - No Updates (Don't send block updates) - Bulldozer (Quickly break blocks) ### Gamemode switcher (Also unbound by default!) Switch between Creative, Survival & Spectator with keybinds. These are also unbound by default. # How to use in Multiplayer In order to function, Gimble needs to be installed on the Server. Gimble will disable all modifications on the client, if it cannot find itself on the server. People without Gimble may still join servers with Gimble installed. There is no permission system (yet).
